fault_hypothesis: The bug is on line 68. The list comprehension uses an inclusive comparison (`>=`) which incorrectly includes timestamps exactly at the cutoff boundary, whereas the specification requires a strict exclusion (`>`).

spec.expr: len(__cbfl_result) == sum(1 for t in timestamps if t > cutoff__1)

constraints.intent: The number of returned timestamps should match the count of input timestamps strictly greater than the cutoff.
The cutoff time must be correctly calculated as the current time minus the window duration.

spec.expr: all(t > now - window for t in __cbfl_result)

constraints.intent: All returned timestamps must be strictly after the start of the audit window.
